_description: Maps N-digit subcat code prefixes to GL (Group Line) names. The first N digits of a subcat code identify the GL, and the last 4 digits identify the subcategory within that GL. For example, code 10101001 = prefix 1010 (Smart Home) + subcat 1001 (Voice Assistants).
_note_shared_prefixes: Some prefixes may be shared between GLs. Disambiguation uses the subcat name matching against the GL-to-Subcat mapping file.
_source: Derived from GL-to-Subcat mapping file + consolidated data file analysis
_note: This is sample/synthetic data for demonstration purposes.
